---
name: Good first issue proposal
about: Suggest a small, reviewable starter task for contributors
title: "[Good first issue]: "
labels: needs triage
assignees: ""
---

## Starter Task

Describe one small change that a new contributor can complete without private context.

## Why This Helps

Explain the user-facing improvement.

## Suggested Files

List the likely public files or docs involved.

## Verification

What command or manual check should prove the change?

## Scope Guard

Confirm this task does not require secrets, private deployments, unreleased roadmap features, or production access.
